title: Final Offspring
wikitext:
[]: Final Offspring             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Aug 28, 2008 8:37 pm If Adam never was impaled by the LoL and went on to keep creating her offspring, what would her final offspring have been? Lilith's final offspring were the Lilim, so I ask this next question: Would the Evangelion(plural) have been Adam's final offspring like that of the Lilim and Lilith? Or were the Evangelion merely bazaar creations of SELLE?

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Thu Aug 28, 2008 10:44 pm Wait, what were Lilith's 'initial' offspring?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Aug 28, 2008 10:46 pm If I'm correct, Adam and Lilith were entirely different beings. Adam had fourteen or fifteen souls (depending on Israfel's exact nature) within her, while Lilith had at least enough to support a biosphere for a minor period of time with plenty of reincarnation, or enough souls to last for the five and a half billion years that Sol would provide reasonable levels of heat and light. Adam didn't HAVE anything left to produce, the Room of Gaf was empty.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Thu Aug 28, 2008 10:48 pm I'm not the best NGE person here, but I'll take a shot. I always thought Lilim (humans) were the possible offspring if knowledge was the chosen characteristic over power. Adam and Lilith are both seeds of life and each seed of life has its own LoL. Okay, I've hit a stumbling block. What is the status of the Lol's when seeds land? Are they impaled into the seeds already? I guess my answer to your questions would be Adam's offspring would be the angels, evangelions are just human created clones of seeds of life and not natural offspring, and the evangelions were in fact tools used by SEELE to carry out its plans.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Aug 28, 2008 11:21 pm Somehow the image of herds of Zeruels grazing serenely on purple trees or something makes me smile a little.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Aug 28, 2008 11:39 pm Obviously this an opinion piece. I really wasn't looking for a solid answer, just different theories.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Aug 29, 2008 12:25 am NemZ wrote: Somehow the image of herds of Zeruels grazing serenely on purple trees or something makes me smile a little.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Aug 29, 2008 5:11 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: I couldn't help myself....

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Aug 29, 2008 6:28 pm after much thought the current idea is more or less that there's no real "Adam-based ECOSYSTEM" that is, not like "Angels" and then "Angelic plantlife" Angel-animals, etc. etc. It's just a dead moon with a few dozen Angels wandering around like Godzilla vs Ghidorah on the surface. Vying for "dominance" and their right to exist against other Angels perhaps? microcosm of Evolution in a way? ***as for focusing on the question in a strict sense: we're not entirely sure if Adam would have kept making hundreds of more Angels if it hadn't been interrupted, or if those 14 were the only 14 (not including Adam, Lilith, and "Tabris") jury is still out on that one

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Aug 29, 2008 7:50 pm There is an Adam based ecosystem, it just isn't needed. You can look at Antartica to see this.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Fri Aug 29, 2008 8:28 pm Maybe the angels contain many souls aka the perfect being like which seele wanted to make the human race into.

[]:             Quote Post by Caiden » Sat Aug 30, 2008 2:43 pm It should be a MANBEARPIG

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 31, 2008 2:32 am Caiden wrote: It should be a MANBEARPIG
